slide1.title: Elite Ship Management
slide1.description: Offering modern fleet operations, planned maintenance, and highly efficient management standards for the international dry cargo sector.

slide2.title: Flawless Safety & Compliance
slide2.description: Ensuring strict safety and uncompromising adherence to global maritime regulations and international standards.

slide3.title: Operational Excellence
slide3.description: Providing strategic supply chain logistics, crew coordination, and premium chartering solutions with an experienced team.

intro.title: Your Trusted Partner in Global Shipping
intro.p1: Tom Shipping delivers premier ship management and maritime operational services tailored for the international dry cargo sector. Our comprehensive suite of services spans end-to-end ship management, marine operations, planned maintenance, strategic supply chain logistics, crew coordination, chartering, and rigorous fleet oversight.
intro.p2: Driven by a highly experienced leadership team, we are dedicated to delivering top-tier service standards aligned with international best practices and seamless operational efficiency.

pillars.title: Our Core Pillars & Commitments
pillars.subtitle: Four core values that guide our operations at every level and set us apart in the maritime industry.

safety.title: Flawless Safety & Compliance
safety.desc: Uncompromising adherence to global maritime regulations and zero-accident target to minimize operational risks.

commercial.title: Optimized Commercial Performance
commercial.desc: Strategic cost management and strict vessel efficiency controls to maximize our clients' commercial returns.

excellence.title: Operational Excellence
excellence.desc: High-tier service standards aligned with international best practices and top-level fleet support.

governance.title: Transparent Governance
governance.desc: Bulletproof documentation, total transparency, and proactive risk management for absolute stakeholder confidence.

cta.title: Discover a New Standard in Fleet Management
cta.subtitle: Ensure your fleet remains safe, efficient, and profitable with Tom Shipping's comprehensive governance and operational solutions.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Decades of Maritime Experience and Forward-Looking Fleet Management

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To provide world-class ship management services centered on safety, transparency, and efficiency in the dry cargo sector, enhancing the commercial value of our clients' assets.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To be one of the most preferred and trusted ship management companies globally, powered by technology, sustainability, and operational excellence.

content.title: The Founding Philosophy of Tom Shipping
content.p1: Tom Shipping was founded to address the critical industry need for total transparency, flawless safety, and operational discipline in dry cargo ship management. Our founders and executives are maritime professionals with decades of field-proven leadership and deep knowledge of global shipping dynamics.
content.p2: We treat every vessel under our management as if it were our own. Through rigorous planned maintenance systems (PMS) and modern vessel monitoring, we preserve their lifecycle and ensure peak performance.
content.p3: Operating with strict environmental stewardship and carbon-neutral targets, we prioritize crew welfare and training, securing sustainable success in all marine operations.

item1.title: Integrity & Trust
item1.desc: Building open, honest, and completely transparent partnerships with all clients and stakeholders.

item2.title: Crew & Vessel Safety
item2.desc: The safety of our crews and vessels is our absolute, non-negotiable priority.

item3.title: Environmental Respect
item3.desc: Implementing active anti-pollution measures and carbon reduction strategies to safeguard the oceans.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: End-to-End Maritime Operations and Ship Management Solutions
services.intro: At Tom Shipping, we provide integrated and professional services tailored to meet the complex and dynamic requirements of the international dry cargo sector.

shipManagement.title: Technical Ship Management
shipManagement.desc: Maintaining peak technical condition through structural inspections, Planned Maintenance Systems (PMS), dry-dock supervision, and responsive technical troubleshooting.

marineOperations.title: Marine Operations
marineOperations.desc: Continuous vessel performance controls, fuel efficiency monitoring, and passage planning for safe and cost-effective voyages.

maintenance.title: Planned Maintenance & Class Integration
maintenance.desc: Executing scheduled machinery checks, structural monitoring, and certification compliance in line with class requirements.

logistics.title: Supply Chain & Logistics
logistics.desc: Managing prompt, cost-efficient procurement and delivery of vessel spares, provisions, lubricants, and technical stores to global ports.

crew.title: Crew Coordination
crew.desc: Selecting, recruiting, rotating, and managing certified, highly-trained, and experienced officers and ratings in full compliance with MLC.

chartering.title: Chartering & Fleet Oversight
chartering.desc: Leveraging a broad network in the dry cargo market to secure profitable voyage and time charter arrangements while monitoring all commercial operations.

fleet.title: Our Fleet
fleet.subtitle: Ensuring Global Maritime Logistics with Modern and Maintained Vessels
fleet.intro: The vessels under our management are maintained to the highest standards, ensuring top-tier operational reliability and safety in international trade. Our fleet complies fully with the latest IMO, MARPOL, and SOLAS requirements.

standards.p1: We oversee our vessels' technical performance using advanced fleet tracking and data-monitoring tools that deliver real-time metrics.
standards.p2: By collaborating with top-tier classification societies (IACS members), we guarantee proper vessel certification and consistently high performance during Port State Control (PSC) inspections.

sustainability.title: Sustainability & Safety
sustainability.subtitle: Safeguarding the Oceans and Providing Secure Work Environments for the Future
sustainability.hseq: Health, Safety, Environment, and Quality (HSEQ) Policy
sustainability.safetyFirstDesc: Adopting a strict zero-accident policy at sea and ashore. We provide secure work environments through regular crew training, updates, and emergency drills.
sustainability.ecoDesc: Integrating modern, fuel-efficient technologies on our vessels to protect marine life and reduce carbon footprint. We take proactive steps in line with IMO 2030 and 2050 greenhouse gas reduction goals.
sustainability.complianceDesc: Guaranteeing full adherence to international maritime codes, conventions, and regulations, including SOLAS, MARPOL, MLC, and the ISM Code.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Join the Tom Shipping Family and Chart Your Course to the Future
careers.seaDesc: We are constantly seeking highly-skilled, disciplined, safety-oriented officers and ratings to join our fleet and develop their careers in international maritime operations.
careers.shoreDesc: Join our headquarters in Üsküdar, İstanbul, to advance your career in vessel operations, technical management, crewing, chartering, or procurement.
careers.name: Full Name
careers.applySuccess: Your application has been received successfully. Our human resources department will contact you after review.

news.title: News & Announcements
news.subtitle: The Latest Updates from Tom Shipping and the Maritime Industry

n1.title: Tom Explorer Joins the Fleet
n1.summary: Our newly built 63,200 DWT Ultramax bulk carrier, Tom Explorer, has been successfully taken under technical management and has commenced her maiden voyage.

n2.title: Carbon Intensity Indicator (CII) Training
n2.summary: We conducted a virtual workshop for all technical superintendents and seagoing officers to ensure complete alignment with IMO's new CII and EEXI rating schemes.

n3.title: Expanding Our Head Office in Üsküdar
n3.summary: To support our growing fleet and operations, we have expanded our main office space and welcomed new industry experts to our commercial and technical departments.
